comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Confirmed current Prescriber and Dosage champions do not contain extract_* classifier nodes; malfunction is optimizer-generated. Plan: add pre-submit structural validation in score editor, document Classifier vs Extractor contract in LangGraphScore docs, and tighten optimizer structural-slot guidance to forbid pseudo-extractor classifiers.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented classifier-as-extractor guardrails. Added pre-submit structural validation in score editor to reject Classifier nodes used as free-form extractors (e.g. valid_classes=['Extracted']) and require class: Extractor + mapped extracted_text output. Updated LangGraphScore YAML docs and optimizer guidance/cookbook to document the Classifier vs Extractor contract. Focused tests passed: test_score_editor_toolset.py + test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (17 passed). Runtime spot-check is currently blocked by a separate procedure creation failure in  (service reports invalid YAML with x0000 even though the procedure YAML parses cleanly in the same base environment); not caused by the new guardrail patch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented classifier-as-extractor guardrails. Added pre-submit structural validation in score editor to reject Classifier nodes used as free-form extractors (for example valid_classes=["Extracted"]) and require class: Extractor plus mapped extracted_text output. Updated LangGraphScore YAML docs and optimizer guidance/cookbook to document the Classifier vs Extractor contract. Focused tests passed: plexus/cli/procedure/test_score_editor_toolset.py and plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (17 passed). Runtime spot-check is currently blocked by a separate procedure optimize creation failure: the service reports invalid YAML with x0000 even though feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml parses cleanly in the same base environment. That blocker appears unrelated to this patch.
